org.jfree.chart.entity

Class XYMeasurementAnnotationEntity

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jfree.chart.entity.ChartEntity
      • org.jfree.chart.entity.XYAnnotationEntity
        • org.jfree.chart.entity.XYMeasurementAnnotationEntity
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Cloneable, MovableChartEntity, PublicCloneable

    public class XYMeasurementAnnotationEntity
extends XYAnnotationEntity
implements MovableChartEntity
    A chart entity that allows to reposition an XYMeasurementAnnotation.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      XYMeasurementAnnotationEntity(Shape hotspot, XYMeasurementAnnotation annotation, int rendererIndex, String toolTipText, String urlText)
      Creates a new entity.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      XYMeasurementAnnotation getAnnotation()
      Returns the annotation this entity refers to.
      void move(Point2D from, Point2D to)
      Moves this entity to the to location.
      Point2D tryMove(Point2D from, Point2D to)
      This method can be used to (dis)allow the move or to guide the move to a preferred location.

    • Constructor Detail

      • XYMeasurementAnnotationEntity

        public XYMeasurementAnnotationEntity(Shape hotspot,
                                     XYMeasurementAnnotation annotation,
                                     int rendererIndex,
                                     String toolTipText,
                                     String urlText)
        Creates a new entity.
        Parameters:
        hotspot - the area.
        annotation - the annotation.
        rendererIndex - the rendererIndex (zero-based index).
        toolTipText - the tool tip text.
        urlText - the URL text for HTML image maps.

    • Method Detail

      • getAnnotation

        public XYMeasurementAnnotation getAnnotation()
        Description copied from class: XYAnnotationEntity
        Returns the annotation this entity refers to.
        Overrides:
        getAnnotation in class XYAnnotationEntity
        Returns:
        The annotation.

      • tryMove

        public Point2D tryMove(Point2D from,
                       Point2D to)
        Description copied from interface: MovableChartEntity
        This method can be used to (dis)allow the move or to guide the move to a preferred location.
        Specified by:
        tryMove in interface MovableChartEntity
        Parameters:
        from - starting point for the move
        to - end point for the move
        Returns:
        to to allow the move as is (default), null to disallow the move and another point to guide the move to an allowed location.
        See Also:
        MovableChartEntity.move(Point2D, Point2D)

      • move

        public void move(Point2D from,
                 Point2D to)
        Description copied from interface: MovableChartEntity
        Moves this entity to the to location.
        Specified by:
        move in interface MovableChartEntity
        Parameters:
        from - starting point for the move
        to - end point for the move
        See Also:
        MovableChartEntity.tryMove(Point2D, Point2D)
